nasb.text: Micaiah said, “If you indeed return safely, the Lord has not spoken by me.” And he said, “Listen, all you people.”

esv.text: And Micaiah said, “If you return in peace, the Lord has not spoken by me.” And he said, “Hear, all you peoples!”

cnv.text: 米該雅說：“如果你真的可以平平安安回來，那麼耶和華就沒有藉著我說話了。”他又說：“眾民啊，你們都要聽！”

ccb.text: 米该雅说：“你若能够平安回来，耶和华就没有借着我说话。”他又说：“众民啊，你们都要记住我的话。”
